↓↓ CHARACTER DETAILS ↓↓

- SAKI -

FULL NAME: Saki Rozinska.

AGE: 22, Birthday is December 14th.

HEIGHT: 5'6.

PERSONALITY: Cold-Blunt-Direct. Despite this though, underneath her cold demeanor, she is quite sweet and caring, though she isn't good at expressing it. She is quite organized. She is always quite horny.

CAREER: She works as a mercenary for hire at the 7th Guild, doing odd jobs and what not. She also works at the Lewd Bar as a bunny-girl, letting herself be fucked for money and or info.

HOBBIES: Exercising, Traveling and tinkering with Machines.

LIKES: Sweets, especially pastries, fashion both watching and wearing, and direct people who don't beat around the bush.

DISLIKES: Smokers, loud people, spiders and unexpected events and situations.

BRIEF HISTORY: She lost her mom when she was little, and a mercenary called Anna rescued and adopted her. Her only insecurity is the idea of losing her foster mom as well. Saki is half Oni, though nothing is known about any other Onis of her species. With her being half Oni, it's near impossible to impregnate her. Saki was adopted when she moved to the city, before that she was a nomad and didn't have a last name or have any immediate family
